Simply Better

IntelligentRecovery Systems

Integrated sauna and cold plunge systems with intelligent control, beautiful hardware, and simple experiences that let the technology stay in the background.

The Gap

Your body creates data. Most products stop there.

Wearables can reveal readiness, strain, and recovery needs. Sidos turns that insight into physical action through premium controls and thermal hardware that guide sauna and cold plunge sessions without making the experience feel more complicated.

Hardware

The
Sidos
System

Sidos is a product company first. Wearable data helps shape the experience, but the real value is in the physical system: premium controls, purpose built thermal hardware, and a simple interface that ties them together.

Shared Controls

Sauna & Plunge Controls

The control experience is simple, quiet, and consistent across products. Sauna and plunge share the same visual language so the system feels like one connected family, not a collection of separate devices.

Connected Intelligence

Recovery Guidance

Biometric data helps shape today’s protocol, but the app is only one part of the system. It guides the same product language carried through the physical controls and thermal hardware.

Physical System

Heater & Thermal Platform

This is where Sidos lives most clearly as a product company. Premium hardware completes the ecosystem and turns recovery guidance into a real sauna and cold plunge experience.

The Sidos Vision

Recovery
Shouldn't Be
Guesswork

Sidos builds physical products that combine thermal performance, intelligent control, and biometric insight into one premium experience that feels quiet, clear, and simply better.
